headline: What Moved Markets This Week
summary: U.S. stocks ended lower on the week as elevated U.S.-Iran tensions remained in focus. Read more about this week's major events on Wall Street.

headline: Coinbase’s Top Lawyer Says Prediction Markets Aren’t Gambling—and Predicts Supreme Court Will Agree
summary: The crypto exchange’s chief legal officer says prediction markets aren’t subject to state gambling regulations. He’s nearly certain the Supreme Court will eventually agree.

headline: Whale's Insight: A Macro-Driven Market With No Safe Haven, And No End To Volatility
summary: Commodities now dominate on-chain perpetual futures, with oil and silver surpassing major crypto tokens in trading volume as traditional finance migrates to 24/7 venues. Read more here.
